scope: R31-recovery (5 dropped module docs) + reference/helper/core docs
verification_source: origin/develop @ee98739fd; reference docs vs gams.com; magpie4_reference vs pinned clone
note: doc-centric only (no question-probes) per the post-R31 cap-adaptive decision. 0 dropped, 22.6 min wall, fresh rate-limit window.

new_errors: module_28.md & module_45.md: Check 17 (file:line citations) flagged 1 bundled error = 10 sub-problems (7 LINE out-of-range + 3 FILE bare/wrong-realization hints). Cause: this round's edits turned approximate '~280' citations into precise line numbers but wrote them as BARE basenames ('presolve.gms:75') or wrong-module-realization hints ('dynamic_may24/presolve.gms:75', 'v2/preloop.gms:36'). The validator resolves bare 'presolve.gms' against the HOST module's own realization (28_ageclass/oct24/presolve.gms = 13 lines; 45_climate/static has no preloop.gms), so module-32 and module-58 usage citations appeared out-of-range/unresolvable. Verified all cited lines are CORRECT against actual source (32_forestry/dynamic_may24/presolve.gms 231 lines; 58_peatland/v2/preloop.gms 43 lines) -> fixed by prefixing full 'modules/XX_name/realization/' path, no revert needed.
gate.notes: FIXED, not reverted. 13 targeted citation-format edits across 2 files; all cited line numbers were verified correct against GAMS source, only the path prefix was missing. module_45.md: 1 edit (v2/preloop.gms:36 -> modules/58_peatland/v2/preloop.gms:36; the other occurrence at line 240 already had full path). module_28.md: 12 edits adding 'modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/' prefix to module-32 USAGE citations of ac_est/ac_sub at presolve.gms lines 9,10,75,76,78,110,138-139,144. Module 28's own SET-DEFINITION citations (presolve.gms:9-10, 12-13, resolving correctly to oct24/presolve.gms) were intentionally left untouched. Also added full path to two in-range bare module-32 citations (presolve.gms:9 and :10 in the 'Key Uses of ac_est' subsection) for internal consistency, since they were unflagged only by coincidence of being <=13 lines but semantically point at module 32. Re-run: Check 17 now 2914/2914 valid; Total checks 42, Passed 40, Warnings 2, Errors 0. The 2 warnings are pre-existing baseline advisories: check_units 5 unit-claim mismatches (modules 60/57/12/56/39, all pre-existing, NOT in this round's edited set) and consumer-attribution 3 Pattern-D1 'no grep-hit' (module_52.md pm_carbon_density_plantation_ac/secdforest_ac/plantation_ac_uncalib) + 1 Pattern-D2 omission (module_16.md vm_supply omits M70). All advisories unchanged from baseline. Not committed, not pushed.

doc_centric_audit.label: module_58
deferred: module.gms:12 cited for v2 methodology (doc:72); line 12 is the @authors line, methodology prose is at realization.gms:8-17 — coarse-pointer drift, borderline Minor, not edited.
§21.1 set breakdown 'Sets 10 / Subsets 4 / Mappings 4' (=18) overcounts vs 12 named set objects + 1 alias, but subset-vs-mapping categorization is a judgment call, not cleanly code-checkable.
'200 spatial clusters / x 200 cells' (doc:822,1135,1837,1843) is run-time clustering config, not fixed in module 58; doc hedges '~200' — not module-58-code-checkable.

§21.2 illustrative table: 'Typical EF (tropical)' rewetted '-0.06' does not match tropical rewetted CO2 (=0 in cs3), but table is explicitly labeled illustrative; per-state EFs elsewhere are correct — Informational.

NOT a bug — doc documents M58's output target (56 prices the peatland slice) and makes no 'zero other consumers' claim; tracing whether MACC sources include 'peatland' is out of scope.
Stale metadata footers (doc:8 'Verified', :1943-1945 'Accuracy 100% / 0 unverified', :1974) are now inaccurate given B1-B7; footer metadata, not a content bug — flagging for maintainer to soften.
doc_centric_audit.summary: module_58 is highly accurate on the load-bearing surface: every variable/equation/realization name, file:line citation into v2/*.gms, scalar default, and EF value checked is correct; default v2 + dynamics-on confirmed. 7 bugs, all Class-6 count drift (1 root cause: §9/§21 summary counts not re-derived from code). doc_centric_audit.label: GAMS_MAgPIE_Patterns
deferred: §2.1 lists kcr as a 'Global set' example (line 278) though it is defined in module 14 (kcr(kve)); also listed as module-specific (line 279). Internally inconsistent classification, but kcr is used model-wide and the §2.3 'Crop products' gloss is conceptually fine. Borderline, not flagged.
§2.3 i='Regions (10-14 aggregated regions)' and j='default ~200 clusters' are config-dependent soft claims (hedged with ~/resolution-dependent); within tolerance, not flagged.

§2.3 i2/j2 labeled 'Aliases' — i2(i) is actually a dynamic subset ('World regions (dynamic set)', sets.gms:122), not a pure alias. Minor imprecision; intent close enough; not flagged (Informational at most).

§1.3/§4.1 solve shown inside loop(t,...) 'in main.gms': literal solve is generated via $batinclude include.gms solve from core/calculations.gms inside a while(sm_intersolve=0,...) intersolve loop. Objective vm_cost_glo and nlp solver are correct; loop/location is a pedagogical simplification. Not flagged (conceptually accurate).

All GAMS-language semantic claims (singleton ct set, $macro compile-time substitution, .fx/.lo/.up/.l suffixes, $() conditions, =e=/=l=/=g=) verified consistent with gams.com (UG_FlowControl confirms equation defs illegal inside loops, justifying the ct pattern) and with real core/macros.gms; no bug.
doc_centric_audit.summary: 7 bugs (6 Major, 1 Minor; 0 Critical). kve/kfo set meanings wrong (kve=land-use activities not veg/fruit; kfo=food set not forestry). vm_land & vm_prod consumer sets list phantom/wrong modules (transitive + cell-vs-regional). §3.4 & §4.6 fabricate equation algebra as real code (§4.6 uses nonexistent pm_gdp_pc_ppp + invalid line cite). Prefixes/file-layout/defaults/macros/GAMS-language all accurate.

doc_centric_audit.label: magpie4_reference
deferred: GAMS modelstat label mapping 1/2/7 = optimal/locally-optimal/feasible (doc line 67) is standard GAMS/CONOPT convention; magpie4 code documents only the NA-fill mechanism (getReport.R:194, @param at 12-15), not the labels. Consistent with convention, not contradicted by code -> not a bug, but the precise label semantics live in GAMS solver docs, not this clone.

getReport.R:62-181 citation (doc line 45) is off by one line from the tryList closing paren (open=62, last arg `level=level`=181, closing `)`=182). NOT flagged as a bug: the rubric's own G4 immutable anchor sanctions 'tryList block ~62-181', the doc snippet is explicitly illustrative (`# ... 114 more calls ...`), and 62-181 accurately bounds the dispatch content. Flagging would be a false positive against an anchor.
doc_centric_audit.summary: Full audit of magpie4_reference.md vs SHA-pinned clone (v2.70.0 @ a360d8c9ec, exact match). 0 confirmed bugs, 10/10. All 106 named report* functions exist (0 phantoms); getReport 117 calls/106 unique, signature, version pins, arg signatures, cross-ref modules all verified. Pre-run advisory refuted: doc is correct.

deferred: magclass::write.mif() namespace (doc:86) — call is bare write.mif() on a quitte object with library(quitte) loaded (merge_report.R:48,18); cf. rds_report.R:43 uses magclass::write.report() for the magclass path. LIKELY should be quitte::write.mif() but the quitte/magclass NAMESPACE is not in the GAMS ground truth (no renv/library installed) — cannot confirm with code evidence.

mip::validationpdf signature & style="comparison" deep semantics (doc:160-162) — call + arg confirmed in comparison_validation.R:46; package internals not in ground truth.

report.mif IAMC variable strings & units (doc:207-235, e.g. Land Cover|Cropland, Emissions|CO2|Land Mt CO2/yr) — produced by magpie4 report* functions, not GAMS; only 'million USD17MER' is corroborated in GAMS declarations.

full.log described as 'GAMS listing/log output' (doc:20) — full.log is the GAMS log (-lf=full.log, submit.R:36); the listing is full.lst (submit.R:45). Mild wording conflation, both files real; not a path bug.
modelstat_<project>.csv (doc:93) — code writes modelstat_<basename(getwd())>.csv (modelstat.R:45); <project> is a reasonable gloss, not flagged.
doc_centric_audit.summary: Score 8/10, MOSTLY ACCURATE (high). 1 Major: cfg$results_folder cited config/default.cfg:2298, actually 2351 (2298 is s80_optfile); value correct. 1 Minor: oq_ prefix is really oq<NN>_ (oq21_notrade). All script-behavior/output-file/GAMS-prefix/config-switch claims verified vs develop ee98739fd. R-package claims (magpie4/quitte/mip) deferred; magclass::write.mif likely should be quitte::.

doc_centric_audit.label: water_scarcity_scenarios
deferred: vm_water_cost units: doc says 'mio. USD17MER/yr' but code declaration (all_sectors_aug13/declarations.gms:31) says 'USD17MER per m^3'. The equation q42_water_cost (equations.gms:16-17) and its direct entry into the Module-11 objective are dimensionally mio USD/yr, so the doc matches the equation; the code's own declaration label is the inconsistent artifact. Flag the code, not the doc.

'Pumping costs parameterized primarily for India' (doc lines 157, 247): f42_pumping_cost is a real parameter (input.gms:126, loaded from .cs4), but the India-centricity is a data-file claim not parseable from GAMS source.
f43_wat_avail index: doc ASCII (line 187) writes f43_wat_avail(t,j) but the declared index is t_all (total_water_aug13/input.gms:16). Cosmetic ASCII imprecision, not load-bearing.
